name: LE SSERAFIM
description: LE SSERAFIM is a powerful 4th generation girl group known for their fierce performances, bold concepts, and athletic choreography.

funFacts: Former IZ*ONE and HKT48 member
One of the most followed K-pop idols from Japan
Known for her gaming skills, especially in Overwatch
Has been in the industry since 2011
Her fans are called 'Sakura Trees'
members.bio: Sakura is a Japanese idol veteran who rose to fame in HKT48 before joining IZ*ONE through Produce 48. With over a decade of experience, she brings unmatched professionalism to LE SSERAFIM. She's known for her gaming streams and elegant presence.

popularSongs.title: FEARLESS
popularSongs.note: Debut title where Sakura's center moment anchored the choreography.

popularSongs.title: ANTIFRAGILE
popularSongs.note: Mini-album title where Sakura's pre-chorus delivers the song's lift.

popularSongs.title: UNFORGIVEN (feat. Nile Rodgers)
popularSongs.note: Title where Sakura's bridge holds the gunslinger choreography frame.

popularSongs.title: EASY
popularSongs.note: Title where Sakura's tone smooths the choreography's snap counts.

members.distinction: Unlike other LE SSERAFIM members, Sakura brings 10+ years of stage experience to the lineup — an ESTJ's operational rigor that lets her serve as the lineup's unofficial vet, which is why her stage blocking is often the cleanest in the formation.
members.fandomChant: FEARNOT chant 'Miyawaki Sakura!' through her dance breaks and tend to switch to Japanese chants on tour stops in Japan.

funFacts: Former IZ*ONE member who placed 10th in Produce 48
Known for her 'killer' charisma on stage
Has a '4D' quirky personality off-stage
Her high notes are legendary
Youngest leader of a HYBE group
members.bio: Chaewon is LE SSERAFIM's leader and main vocalist. Despite her cute appearance, she's known for her fierce stage presence, earning the nickname 'Baby Demon.' Her powerful vocals and leadership skills have made her the heart of LE SSERAFIM.

popularSongs.title: FEARLESS
popularSongs.note: Debut title where Chaewon's main-vocal lines anchored the chorus.

popularSongs.title: ANTIFRAGILE
popularSongs.note: Title where Chaewon's 'antifragile' hook delivery became karaoke-defining.

popularSongs.title: UNFORGIVEN
popularSongs.note: Title where Chaewon's spaghetti-western chorus delivery defined the song's image.

popularSongs.title: Smart
popularSongs.note: Pre-release where Chaewon's wink-delivery hook went viral.

members.distinction: Unlike other LE SSERAFIM members, Chaewon balances main-vocal load with the youngest-leader role — an INFP's emotional bandwidth packaged as 'baby demon' charisma, which is why her live runs sound emotionally invested rather than rehearsed.
members.fandomChant: FEARNOT chant 'Kim Chaewon!' through her chorus delivery and tend to throw heart-finger gestures during her 'baby demon' wink moments.

funFacts: Born in Korea, raised in New York
Participated in Produce 48 but didn't make final lineup
Plays piano and writes songs
Known for her powerful, emotional vocals
Her original song 'Raise y_our glass' went viral
members.bio: Yunjin is a Korean-American vocalist who didn't make IZ*ONE but got a second chance with LE SSERAFIM. Her powerful vocals and songwriting skills have made her a standout. She's known for her confident personality and emotional performances.

popularSongs.title: FEARLESS
popularSongs.note: Debut title where Yunjin's belt sections defined the bridge.

popularSongs.title: Raise y_our glass
popularSongs.note: Self-written solo upload that went viral pre-album.

popularSongs.title: UNFORGIVEN
popularSongs.note: Title where Yunjin's pre-chorus melody is the song's recognition cue.

popularSongs.title: Crazy
popularSongs.note: Title where Yunjin's English ad-libs frame the chorus drop.

members.distinction: Unlike other LE SSERAFIM members, Yunjin writes her own material in English and Korean — an ENFP's voice channelled through pop-rock structures, which is why her demo uploads end up on the album versions.
members.fandomChant: FEARNOT chant 'Huh Yunjin!' through her belt sections and tend to sing along to her English bridges in chorus.

funFacts: Trained as a professional ballerina for 15 years
Studied at Royal Ballet School in Netherlands
Known for her elegant, graceful movements
Had the shortest training period in the group
Her ballet background makes her dancing unique
members.bio: Kazuha is a former professional ballerina from Japan who trained at the prestigious Royal Ballet School. Her elegant movements and graceful presence set her apart in K-pop. Despite limited K-pop training, her dance background made her a natural fit.

popularSongs.title: FEARLESS
popularSongs.note: Debut title where Kazuha's ballet posture reframed the choreography.

popularSongs.title: ANTIFRAGILE
popularSongs.note: Mini-album title where Kazuha's center moment in the dance break became iconic.

popularSongs.title: Perfect Night
popularSongs.note: Overwatch 2 collaboration single where Kazuha's choreography is the song's identity.

popularSongs.title: EASY
popularSongs.note: Title where Kazuha's controlled-line choreography defines the visual.

members.distinction: Unlike other LE SSERAFIM members, Kazuha brings 15 years of classical ballet training into the choreography — an INFJ's interior focus that translates as full-extension lines, which is why her dance practice cuts get cross-posted on ballet accounts.
members.fandomChant: FEARNOT chant 'Nakamura Kazuha!' through her dance breaks and pull out the ballerina hand sign during her cinder-cool moments.

funFacts: Youngest member, debuted at 15
Exceptionally athletic - excels at sports
Known for her 'cat-like' visuals and personality
Despite being youngest, very confident on stage
Her archery skills went viral on variety shows
members.bio: Eunchae is LE SSERAFIM's maknae who debuted at just 15 years old. Despite her young age, she's remarkably athletic and confident. Her cat-like visuals and playful personality have won over fans worldwide.

popularSongs.title: FEARLESS
popularSongs.note: Debut title where Eunchae's rap section introduced her flow.

popularSongs.title: ANTIFRAGILE
popularSongs.note: Title where Eunchae's bilingual rap delivery cuts through the chorus.

popularSongs.title: UNFORGIVEN
popularSongs.note: Title where Eunchae's rap break gives the song its tempo shift.

popularSongs.title: EASY
popularSongs.note: Title where Eunchae's rap-bridge tone resets the verses.

members.distinction: Unlike other LE SSERAFIM members, Eunchae executes main-rap delivery while being the maknae — an ISTP's cool detachment that lets her drop sharp bars without breaking facial composure on camera.
members.fandomChant: FEARNOT chant 'Hong Eunchae!' through her rap section and switch to 'Chaechae!' calls during her variety-show moments.
